name: credit-risk
description: MCP specification for the bank credit risk assessment agent.

tools.name: assess_credit
tools.description: Initiate credit risk assessment for a new onboarding client. May request documents, propose terms, or submit a recommendation.

tools.name: continue_assessment
tools.description: Resume credit assessment after documents or a counter-proposal has been received.

data_hash.description: Hash of submitted data or counter-proposal

resources.name: Credit Terms
resources.description: Current proposed credit terms for a flow.

prompts.name: credit_assessment
prompts.description: Credit risk assessment prompt for institutional client onboarding.

arguments.name: client_name
arguments.description: Legal name of the institutional client
